Chat Unify.app 4.4

Mac · local-first · Prompt Forge · Connect · Verify & Act · Audit Trail · Proof Pack.

Download for Mac (.dmg) Full web desk Try demo Release notes →

Requires macOS 12+. After install: Cmd+Q any old copy, open from Applications. Server runs on 127.0.0.1:13023.
